Short CV

Enis Kranda was born in 1996 and completed his primary and secondary education at Sarıyer Primary School. In 2014, he graduated from İSOV Dinçkök Industrial Vocational High School with first place in the Industrial Maintenance and Repair Department of Electrical and Electronics Technology. In 2019, he graduated from Karabük University Faculty of Engineering, Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering with a good degree. In 2022, he received his Master's Degree from Karabük University Graduate Education Institute Electrical and Electronics Engineering Department. As of 2022, he started his PhD in Yıldız Technical University Electrical Machines and Power Electronics Program and has been working as a research assistant at Üsküdar University since the same year.
